questionHtml:
A proton has momentum 10-20 N s and the uncertainty in the position of the proton is 10-10 m. What is the minimum fractional uncertainty in the momentum of this proton?

A. 5 × 10-25

B. 5 × 10-15

C. 5 × 10-5

D. 2 × 104

meta.title: A proton has momentum 10-20 N s and the uncertainty in the position of the proton is 10-10 m. What is the minimum fractional uncertainty in the momentum of this proton? A. 5 × 10-2
breadcrumbLabels: 12.1 – The interaction of matter with radiation
